subcodes.first_line: And concerning that which was asked about objects found along the way, the decree of God is that if they be found in cities and villages [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و اینکه از اشیائی که در طریق یافت شود سؤال شده بود حکم الله آنکه اگر در مدن و قری یافت
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @business; financial; property matters
